query:
INSERT INTO computations_branch (
            output_handle,
            dependencies,
            fhe_operation,
            is_scalar,
            dependence_chain_id,
            transaction_id,
            is_allowed,
            created_at,
            schedule_order,
            is_completed,
            host_chain_id,
            block_number,
            producer_block_hash
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW(), $8::timestamp, $9, $10, $11, $12)
        ON CONFLICT (output_handle, transaction_id, producer_block_hash) DO NOTHING
